title: SafetyLimit
description: Safety bounds enforced before any hardware interaction. See crates/odmr-recipe/src/types.rs SafetyLimit.

max_power_dbm.description: Maximum RF output power in dBm

max_frequency_hz.description: Maximum allowed RF frequency in Hz

min_frequency_hz.description: Minimum allowed RF frequency in Hz

max_mag_ramp_rate_a_per_s.description: Maximum magnet current ramp rate in A/s
